mapper.select:
SELECT I.INBOUND_ID AS inboundId, I.INBOUND_NO AS inboundNo, I.INBOUND_TYPE AS inboundType, I.INBOUND_DATE AS inboundDate, I.STATUS AS status, I.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, C.CUSTOMER_NAME AS customerName, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName, U.NAME AS createdUserName FROM INBOUNDS I LEFT JOIN CUSTOMERS C ON I.CUSTOMER_ID = C.CUSTOMER_ID JOIN WAREHOUSES W ON I.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID JOIN USERS U ON I.CREATED_USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE 1=1
AND I.INBOUND_NO LIKE CONCAT('%', #{inboundNo}, '%')
AND I.INBOUND_TYPE = #{inboundType}
AND I.STATUS = #{status}
AND C.CUSTOMER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND W.WAREHOUSE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{warehouseName}, '%')
ORDER BY I.INBOUND_ID DESC

SELECT I.INBOUND_ID AS inboundId, I.INBOUND_NO AS inboundNo, I.INBOUND_TYPE AS inboundType, I.INBOUND_DATE AS inboundDate, I.STATUS AS status, I.REMARK AS remark, I.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, I.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, I.WAREHOUSE_ID AS warehouseId, C.CUSTOMER_NAME AS customerName, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName, U.NAME AS createdUserName FROM INBOUNDS I LEFT JOIN CUSTOMERS C ON I.CUSTOMER_ID = C.CUSTOMER_ID JOIN WAREHOUSES W ON I.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID JOIN USERS U ON I.CREATED_USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE I.INBOUND_ID = #{inboundId}

SELECT D.INBOUND_DETAIL_ID AS inboundDetailId, D.INBOUND_ID AS inboundId, D.ITEM_ID AS itemId, IT.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, IT.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, D.QUANTITY AS quantity, D.UNIT_PRICE AS unitPrice, D.TOTAL_PRICE AS totalPrice, D.REMARK AS remark FROM INBOUND_DETAILS D JOIN ITEMS IT ON D.ITEM_ID = IT.ITEM_ID WHERE D.INBOUND_ID = #{inboundId} ORDER BY D.INBOUND_DETAIL_ID ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE INBOUNDS SET STATUS = 'COMPLETED' WHERE INBOUND_ID = #{inboundId} AND STATUS = 'DRAFT'
